Senior Cloud Platform Engineer

We are looking for an experienced engineer to lead our Kubernetes platform
team. You will design and operate multi-tenant Kubernetes clusters on AWS,
improve our CI/CD pipelines, and mentor junior engineers.

Responsibilities:
- Design and operate multi-tenant Kubernetes clusters on AWS
- Improve our CI/CD pipelines and developer experience
- Mentor junior engineers and lead design reviews

Requirements:
- 5+ years of experience with Python and Go
- Deep knowledge of AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform
- Experience with PostgreSQL and Redis at scale
- Strong communication and mentoring skills
- Experience with observability stacks (Prometheus, Grafana) is a plus
